content.text:
评论数据如下，请依据这些数据进行总结，如无明确指令不要延伸调用其他工具。可以给用户获取延伸数据的功能建议。
[{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20260301","评星":1.0,"标题":"Keeps Cutting Power – Very Disappointing","评论":"This product has been extremely frustrating. Every time I plug it in and turn it on, it cuts the power in my entire apartment. I followed the instructions exactly as written, but the issue keeps happening.
On top of that, the attachments don’t fit properly. They feel loose and poorly made, which makes it even harder to use.

As for the cleaning performance — it’s very weak. It can barely clean anything. Honestly, anything this steamer manages to clean can be done more effectively with a simple brush and less effort.

Completely disappointed. Do not buy — total waste of money."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20260212","评星":1.0,"标题":"Spits water doesnt work right","评论":"I bought this steam cleaner and didnt end up using it for the first time within my return time period. Ive tried using it several times and have read the directions and all that it does is spit out a bunch of water. I have never been able to get it to work right. Very disappointed but too late now. Ill just have to throw it away."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20260210","评星":3.0,"标题":"It‘s really work good","评论":"Very good product"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20260205","评星":3.0,"标题":"It was good until it wasn’t","评论":"I bought my medicine last year on a great deal. I only have used it maybe 5 times and it worked great. I just pulled it back out for the first time in a few months. It completely stops working it’s barely getting hot and no steam is coming out. Ugh"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20260128","评星":1.0,"标题":"Don‘t reccomed","评论":"Some of the attachments kept falling off when in use and since it‘s plastic it is not meant to last. You do have to wait for it to heat up and cool down before use or needing to refill. The tank is also small so this is only good for very mall cleaning jobs unless you are willing to wait to cool down, refill, reheat, and then use."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20251018","评星":1.0,"标题":"Terrible","评论":"It doesn‘t work. Like, at all. Parts dont fit correctly and when it “steams“ it doesn‘t actually do anything. Its worthless. Save your money and don‘t buy think junk. If it could be a 0 for the amount of help it was, I would"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20251006","评星":2.0,"标题":"Pressurized Steamer","评论":"This product didn‘t meet my expectations for several reasons:1).  Tank too small2).  Attachments didn‘t align correctly and wasn‘t stable while working with them.3).  Too much steam escaping with no control (should have an adjustable knob).4).  No button to hold steam on without keeping your finger on the button.I do not recommend  this product for lack of ease to use."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250930","评星":1.0,"标题":"Potential Hazard","评论":"Bought in April, didn‘t use until June. Worked great until it started to split in half. Now it doesn‘t remain heated and I‘m terrified it will explode and seriously hurt myself of someone in our household."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250927","评星":2.0,"标题":"Poor performance","评论":"I was disappointed that the fixtures broke and the unit did steam well as advertised."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250927","评星":1.0,"标题":"NG","评论":"Do not be fooled- doesn’t work"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250927","评星":2.0,"标题":"Meh","评论":"Not as good as people say. Def not worth it"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250924","评星":1.0,"标题":"Attachments come off under pressure","评论":"Connections pop off under high pressure and burn your skin. Be careful. Burned my face and chest."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250914","评星":1.0,"标题":"Not worth your money!","评论":"Terrible. Attachments don’t go on properly. Don’t waste your time and money.When you’re trying to use the one with the cloth it doesn’t go on straight so you have to turn the machine that the cloth part is flat against the cloth.Also you can’t tell how much water is leftI was missing an attachment. I had 2 of the same one instead."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250912","评星":1.0,"标题":"Nothing","评论":"This item is not working false information don’t wasting money"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250901","评星":1.0,"标题":"Keep shopping","评论":"Had high hopes for this but was disappointed.  There is no way to tell how much liquid is left and seems to run out fast.  Tested it out on grout and oven window to try and get some of the grime out. It did take some but the steam was cold and more air than anything. At time it would just splatter cold water.  I thought maybe I didn’t let it warm up enough and let it warm for the the 4 min it recommends still wasn’t hot steam. Left a bit more and it did seem to warm up more but didn’t last. Other bad part is that when you think you need to refill you have to release the pressure by holding down the trigger until enough pressure is released to remove the cap. There is a slow release nozzle when you unplug it.  Make a quick clean up job very time consuming."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250820","评星":1.0,"标题":"Not happy…","评论":"Steam doesnt have good pressure also the heat doesnt even make it watery for you to clean. Not a good product. Dont believe the hype im sure it’s all influencer hype. The accessories fall off"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250816","评星":1.0,"标题":"Not a good product","评论":"Used it one time. Second time went to use it the seal popped off the rim. Amazon was great and offered return. But I wouldn’t buy this product."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250813","评星":2.0,"标题":"Stopped working","评论":"This steamer quit after using 4 times it would not heat the water. I tried everything to get to work. It was great when it worked"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250806","评星":3.0,"标题":"straight and showers","评论":"this thing is amazing I mean when you get down on the grout and start steaming it out it‘s great on Windows it‘s just amazing"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250805","评星":1.0,"标题":"Steamer","评论":"The extender cord braces loose easily and also the protective outer cover broke loose and got extremely hot."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250803","评星":3.0,"标题":"cumbersome","评论":"attachments and water cap do not screw on and off comfortably. would be nice to have a pouch or something to keepattacments in"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250730","评星":2.0,"标题":"Uncomfortable to Hold","评论":"The handle is too small and doesn‘t provide enough grip, makeing it uncomfortable to hold for extended periods of time and causing my hand to cramp up and ache after just a few minutes of use."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250729","评星":1.0,"标题":"The material is not of good quality.","评论":"Soon, cracks began to appear."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250726","评星":1.0,"标题":"It doesn’t work at all!!","评论":"It totally failed. We tried it on several areas and it was too weak to make a difference. We threw it away."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250726","评星":3.0,"标题":"Somewhat limited","评论":"Water capacity is rather limited.  Heating it up for 10 minutes, using it for 3 minutes then letting it cool down for 10 minutes seems like an effort in futilityRichard Butler"},{"评论产品的属性":"","评论日期":"20250722","评星":2.0,"标题":"Two Stars – It’s Got Steam… Just Not the Power","评论":"I was pretty excited to get a steam cleaner for indoor use. I’ve got a more powerful one in the garage that works great, and I figured this smaller version would help keep my wife from “borrowing” mine. Spoiler alert: she won‘t be fighting me for this one.Let’s start with the good stuff. This handheld steamer comes with a nice variety of attachments, including three soft nylon brushes. That’s actually a thoughtful touch, since those things tend to wear out fast. The unit is lightweight, easy to fill, and heats up fairly quickly.Unfortunately, that’s where the praise ends.When I tried to demo this steamer in action, it became clear that finding something it could clean was going to be the real challenge. I tested it on soot at the bottom of a pot—nope. Crud around the base of the kitchen faucet—barely phased it. The gunk where the sink meets the counter? Mild improvement. Wrinkles in a shirt? You’d have better luck using the hot air from a sigh.At just over 1000 watts, this steamer just doesn’t have the muscle to do anything more than maybe freshen up already-clean surfaces. You’ll find yourself holding the nozzle in one spot and hoping for a miracle. And miracles weren’t happening in my kitchen.Final verdict? It’s underpowered and overpriced for what it can actually do. If the manufacturer gave it about 50% more wattage, we might be having a very different conversation. But as it stands, it struggles to handle the basics. Skip this one unless you need a mildly warm puff of water vapor with a handle."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250721","评星":1.0,"标题":"Weak Steam Pressure – Doesn’t Clean Anything","评论":"The “pressurized“ steam is more like a sad mist. Grease, grime, and stains don’t budge. My old rag and spray cleaner work better."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250719","评星":2.0,"标题":"There is water in the water tank.","评论":"There was water in the tank like it was previously used and the product was not working properly."},{"评论产品的属性":"","评论日期":"20250718","评星":3.0,"标题":"Adequate steamer","评论":"This high pressure 1050 watt steam cleaner is just adequate. Other steamers have 2500 watts of power. It is lightweight and ease to use. It takes over 3 minutes to get steam. There are no gloves that come with it so you really have to be careful. It has a 350 ml water tank, but you can only fill it to 250 ml. I used it to clean my tile grout and it took longer than my other steamer, probably because it is less powerful. It is lightweight and has a 9 foot cord. The hose was long enough that I could maneuver it with ease. It is great that you only need water, no chemicals are needed. It comes with a bunch of attachments, so it is versatile. The small brush is what I used for the shower. The steamer seems well made."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250717","评星":3.0,"标题":"Steam cleaning","评论":"For the price, this thing had me cleaning everything! It heats up fast, the pressure of hot water, no chemicals was nice. It’s easy to use, small handheld, can be used even in tight spaces and corners. The only reason I considered returning it, it has a small spout so it’s a small stream.  Otherwise it will have you cleaning everything"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250716","评星":2.0,"标题":"Did not do the job that was advertised","评论":"This was advertised that it would clean my upholstery, but it didn’t do the job. I wanted to send it back. They gave me a refund."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250715","评星":1.0,"标题":"It‘s so bad.","评论":"There is no cleaning power at all. It‘s simply false advertising"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250713","评星":2.0,"标题":"Quick return","评论":"I purchased this for routine housecleaning. Unfortunately, there is not enough power to this. It didn’t work on my window sills. It also leaks from the top which so read about. I’m returning this item."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250709","评星":1.0,"标题":"Difficult to use.","评论":"It‘s not like what the advertisement claims. It cannot be thoroughly cleaned."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250708","评星":1.0,"标题":"recommend to anyone.","评论":"I regret buying this product. The steam isn‘t hot enough to sanitize surfaces properly. The cord is ridiculously short, making it impossible to move around. The plastic parts feel cheap and started cracking after minimal use. Would not recommend to anyone."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250707","评星":1.0,"标题":"Inadequate Functionality","评论":"Lacks essential features, not fulfilling its purpose."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250707","评星":2.0,"标题":"Waste of money!","评论":"This product is a complete disappointment. The steam output is weak even at maximum setting, barely removing light stains. The water tank leaks constantly, leaving puddles everywhere. After 15 minutes of use, the handle becomes uncomfortably hot. The attachments fall off mid-cleaning. Worse, it stopped producing steam completely after just 3 uses. Waste of money!"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250701","评星":1.0,"标题":"Not worthy","评论":"It does not work, I used it to clean my shower and I had to used it 5 times, by the end my wrist and back were hurting, the nasal tube attached to the unit moves everywhere, the brush attachments are to small so the cleaning entire house is not possible. I tried cleaning my fabric sofa and it did nothing like the picture or video from vendor."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250701","评星":2.0,"标题":"working entirely.","评论":"Terrible construction and performance. The plastic housing feels flimsy and cheap. Steam output varies wildly with no consistency. The included scrub brush attachment fell apart immediately. After two weeks, the heating element stopped working entirely."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250701","评星":2.0,"标题":"Very poor design.","评论":"This cleaner overheats after just 5 minutes of use and shuts down automatically. The cord is too short to move around freely. The steam trigger is stiff and hurts my fingers. Very poor design."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250701","评星":2.0,"标题":"Avoid at all costs.","评论":"Worse than useless - it‘s actually hazardous. The steam cleaner spits out boiling water droplets randomly. The plastic parts emit toxic fumes when heated. The power switch is poorly positioned and hard to operate. Avoid at all costs."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250630","评星":1.0,"标题":"and avoid this product.","评论":"This steam cleaner is a complete failure. The trigger mechanism broke after third use. The water reservoir is difficult to fill without spilling. Steam production is pathetic - more like warm mist than actual steam. Save yourself the frustration and avoid this product."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250630","评星":1.0,"标题":"Unreliable Performance","评论":"Fails to work consistently, unreliable experience."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250630","评星":1.0,"标题":"control issues.","评论":"This product is dangerously defective. The steam comes out in unpredictable bursts, sometimes scalding my hand. The safety lock doesn‘t work properly. The hose attachment melted during first use. Poor manufacturing with obvious quality control issues."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250629","评星":1.0,"标题":"Hated it!!","评论":"Why did you pick this product vs others?:Terrible product made my carpets to wet and steam was not hot enough to get my stair carpets clean . I returned it"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250629","评星":1.0,"标题":"engineering overall.","评论":"The water tank is impossible to see through, so you can‘t tell how much water is left. Steam comes out in bursts rather than continuously. The handle design causes wrist strain. Poor engineering overall."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250628","评星":2.0,"标题":"Capacity is very small.","评论":"It was really annoying having to keep pressing the switch over and over again in order to get the steam to come out."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250627","评星":1.0,"标题":"Not worth it","评论":"Steam quality is horrible  it doesn’t get hot at all!!!"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250627","评星":3.0,"标题":"Used product","评论":"My product was clearly used and I paid full price for a brand new item"},{"评论产品的属性":"","评论日期":"20250625","评星":1.0,"标题":"Flex hose broke immediately","评论":"The flexible hose broke within 10 minutes of first use and sprayed boiling water on my hand. This is extremely dangerous and the product should be recalled immediately."},{"评论产品的属性":"","评论日期":"20250625","评星":1.0,"标题":"Need my money back","评论":"Sometimes it heats up normally, other times it takes forever or doesn‘t heat at all. The heating element seems to be failing or poorly manufactured."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250622","评星":2.0,"标题":"After being heated, it ran for one minute and then stopped.","评论":"After being heated, it ran for one minute and then stopped. I cooled it down, emptied the liquid inside, refilled it, and waited for a much longer period of time."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250622","评星":2.0,"标题":"When the steam is turned on, it will splash water everywhere.","评论":"When the steam is started, water will be splashed everywhere, and the amount of steam produced is very weak."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250622","评星":2.0,"标题":"But it had no effect at all.","评论":"This is the main reason why I bought it. I tried using it in the gaps between tiles, but it didn‘t work at all. I followed the instructions three times."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250622","评星":3.0,"标题":"Ok for the money.","评论":"Does not take out stains as well as portrayed in the videos. For what the cost is it works ok."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250621","评星":2.0,"标题":"Unless you really want to waste your time and get burned, don‘t buy this thing at all.","评论":"Why did you pick this product vs others?:That metal material is of poor quality and cannot withstand pressure. It has now completely broken down and is completely useless. Unless you really want to waste your time and get burned, don‘t buy this thing at all."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250620","评星":1.0,"标题":"This device is poorly designed.","评论":"This device is poorly designed. The steam comes out in uneven bursts rather than a steady flow. The handle gets uncomfortably hot during operation. The water tank empties too quickly for larger cleaning jobs. The included accessories don‘t fit securely. Overall a frustrating experience."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250620","评星":2.0,"标题":"The effect will be better when performing this operation outdoors.","评论":"If you spray the steam mode of the iron onto a certain surface, or blow a breath onto the item you want to clean in cold weather, then you are more likely to achieve a clean surface... The effect will be better when performing this operation outdoors."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250620","评星":2.0,"标题":"The effect was not as good as what was shown in the video and comments.","评论":"Why did you pick this product vs others?:The effect was not as good as what was shown in the video and comments. Overall, I felt extremely disappointed and I even doubted that I would never use it again."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250619","评星":1.0,"标题":"Auto-shutoff engages","评论":"Auto-shutoff engages too early during continuous use. Plastic smell persists after dozens of uses. Nozzle rotates unintentionally losing focus. Carpet attachment just wets fibers without cleaning."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250619","评星":2.0,"标题":"Unit tips over when","评论":"Unit tips over when placed on uneven surfaces. No child safety features despite extreme heat. Water splashes out when carrying filled unit. Nozzle cleaner tool breaks immediately."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250618","评星":1.0,"标题":"Doesn’t work!","评论":"Had It for a month and stopped working. No steam comes out anymore. It only shoots water out. I haven’t done anything different. I’m a day late to send it back. Wish I could’ve loved it"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250618","评星":1.0,"标题":"Total Disappointment","评论":"Did not operate to near any level as expected.  A total disappointment.  Returned after trying in multiple surfaces."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250618","评星":1.0,"标题":"After just 3 weeks of light use,","评论":"After just 3 weeks of light use, the heating element stopped working completely. Customer service was unresponsive to my warranty claim requests."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250618","评星":2.0,"标题":"Battery dies mid","评论":"Battery dies mid-cleaning despite full charge. Steam output varies randomly from weak puff to dangerous jets. Fabric attachment leaves permanent water marks. Plastic casing develops cracks from normal use."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250618","评星":2.0,"标题":"The instruction manual","评论":"The instruction manual is useless - poorly translated with unclear diagrams. I burned myself trying to figure out how to assemble the basic attachments properly."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250617","评星":1.0,"标题":"The water tank is tiny and needs","评论":"The water tank is tiny and needs constant refilling. For any serious cleaning job, you’ll spend more time refilling than actually cleaning. Extremely inefficient design."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250617","评星":2.0,"标题":"Steam production","评论":"Steam production stops randomly during use. You have to wait several minutes for it to start working again. Completely unreliable for any serious cleaning job around the house."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250617","评星":2.0,"标题":"This only emitted steam for about one minute and then rested.","评论":"This only emitted steam for about one minute and then rested. I let it steam again for a minute or less, and it just stopped running, although all the instructions were followed."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250616","评星":1.0,"标题":"Disappointment","评论":"Very disappointing! Does not work as advertised. Made a mess when steaming furniture & didn’t clean it. Don’t waste your money."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Red","评论日期":"20250613","评星":2.0,"标题":"Not the worst, certainly not the best","评论":"I went into this product hopeful it was going to be a big hit in my deep cleaning routine. After about an hour or two of applying a little pressure with the tip of the hose, it started bending and losing stability. Bummed because it would be nice to have added this into the rotation and rely on it, quality-wise. It’s nice and small, but the electric cord could definitely use a longer footage. Giving this a 2 star because it’s not really worth it."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250610","评星":1.0,"标题":"This product DOES not work!","评论":"This product does not perform as described.  I did not have a chance to try it before return had expired. This product DID not clean my bathtub"},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250607","评星":1.0,"标题":"Not worth the money","评论":"This is not worth the money. Machine gets extremely hot, attachments were very hard to snap on after numerous tries and the cap wouldn’t come off to refill even when pressing down. The metal bristle attachment and entire section came out. I will be returning."},{"评论产品的属性":"Color=Deep Gray","评论日期":"20250601","评星":1.0,"标题":"Trash.","评论":"Horrible would give worse review if I could. Used it 2 times I tried to use it again and no steam would come out just a piping hot gun. Water leaks and attachments gives bare minimum of what your looking for.
